calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT THREAD LOUNG INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted for good cause shown. Plaintiff filed a statement of non-opposition on April 23, 2014. The Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
